mapper.select: SELECT * FROM delivery_address WHERE member_idx = #{memberIdx} AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.update: update delivery_address set delivery_label = #{deliveryLabel}, recipient_name = #{recipientName}, recipient_phone = #{recipientPhone}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, delivery_address1 = #{deliveryAddress1}, delivery_address2 = #{deliveryAddress2}, delivery_request = #{deliveryRequest}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude} where delivery_address_idx = #{deliveryAddressIdx} and member_idx = #{memberIdx}
mapper.insert: insert into delivery_address( member_idx, delivery_label, recipient_name, recipient_phone, zip_code, delivery_address1, delivery_address2, delivery_request, longitude, latitude ) values ( #{memberIdx}, #{deliveryLabel}, #{recipientName}, #{recipientPhone}, #{zipCode}, #{deliveryAddress1}, #{deliveryAddress2}, #{deliveryRequest}, #{longitude}, #{latitude} )
